top3.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Player_Attributes pa
JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
WHERE pa.preferred_foot = 'left' 
  AND pa.crossing = (
    SELECT MAX(crossing) 
    FROM Player_Attributes 
    WHERE preferred_foot = 'left'
  );

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Player_Attributes pa
JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
WHERE pa.preferred_foot = 'left' 
  AND pa.crossing = (
    SELECT MAX(crossing) 
    FROM Player_Attributes 
    WHERE preferred_foot = 'left'
  );

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Player_Attributes pa
WHERE pa.preferred_foot = 'left' 
  AND pa.crossing = (
    SELECT MAX(pa2.crossing) 
    FROM Player_Attributes pa2
    WHERE pa2.preferred_foot = 'left'
      AND pa2.crossing IS NOT NULL
  )
  AND pa.crossing IS NOT NULL;

final.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM Player_Attributes pa
JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
WHERE pa.preferred_foot = 'left' 
  AND pa.crossing = (
    SELECT MAX(crossing) 
    FROM Player_Attributes 
    WHERE preferred_foot = 'left'
  );
